description: Execute V0.8 NPM Cleanup: The human maintainer has successfully published the package to the public NPM registry. Remove the temporary Git-clone local installation workarounds and maintainer notes from the documentation, restoring the clean 1-click 'npm install -g team-agents-cowork' instructions.
scope: 1. Revert the 'Global Installation' section in README.md and README_zh-CN.md to the standard 'npm install -g team-agents-cowork' command. 2. Apply the exact same cleanup to documentation/EN/getting-started/installation.md and documentation/ZH/getting-started/installation.md. 3. Ensure no placeholder text or workaround notes remain.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO modifications to src/, bin/, package.json, or active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this patch progression. NO implementation of runtime execution code. This is a documentation cleanup only.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify source code in src/ or bin/.
